ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company that developed the test */,
  "test_name" TEXT /* Name of the test */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the test */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of the test (e.g., PCR, Antibody) */,
  "approval_status" TEXT /* Approval status of the test */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the test was approved */,
  "test_method" TEXT /* Detailed description of the test method */,
  "intended_use" TEXT /* Intended use of the test */,
  "sample_type" TEXT /* Type of sample required for the test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tests_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the company */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the primary contact person */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the company's website */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date when the company was established */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company operates in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test result */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test */,
  "prevalence" REAL /* Prevalence of the test */,
  "ppv" REAL /* Positive predictive value (PPV) of the test */,
  "ppv_95ci_low" REAL /* Lower bound of the 95% confidence interval for PPV */,
  "ppv_95ci_high" REAL /* Upper bound of the 95% confidence interval for PPV */,
  "npv" REAL /* Negative predictive value (NPV) of the test */,
  "npv_95ci_low" REAL /* Lower bound of the 95% confidence interval for NPV */,
  "npv_95ci_high" REAL /* Upper bound of the 95% confidence interval for NPV */,
  "p_pos" REAL /* Positive rate of the test */,
  "p_pos_low" REAL /* Lower bound of the 95% confidence interval for positive rate */,
  "p_pos_high" REAL /* Upper bound of the 95% confidence interval for positive rate */,
  "fdr" REAL /* False discovery rate (FDR) of the test */,
  "fdr_95ci_low" REAL /* Lower bound of the 95% confidence interval for FDR */,
  "fdr_95ci_high" REAL /* Upper bound of the 95% confidence interval for FDR */,
  "fomr" REAL /* False omission rate (FOMR) of the test */,
  "fomr_95ci_low" REAL /* Lower bound of the 95% confidence interval for FOMR */,
  "fomr_95ci_high" REAL /* Upper bound of the 95% confidence interval for FOMR */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date when the test was conducted */,
  "test_location" TEXT /* Location where the test was conducted */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Number of samples used in the test */,
  "positive_count" INTEGER /* Number of positive results */,
  "negative_count" INTEGER /* Number of negative results */,
  "total_count" INTEGER /* Total number of tests conducted */,
  "test_condition" TEXT /* Conditions under which the test was conducted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES tests ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "team" TEXT /* Specific team the user is part of */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test result being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the test result */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the test result was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser/device used */,
  "access_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES test_results ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the version */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was released */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the version changes */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_versions_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES tests ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_results_versions" (
  "result_version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result version */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the result */,
  "result_date" TEXT /* Date when the result was obtained */,
  "result_version_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the result version */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the result version (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_versions_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES test_results ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_versions_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES test_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies_tests" (
  "company_test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company-test relationship */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_companies_tests_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES tests ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_companies_tests_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_subcategories" (
  "subcategory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subcategory */,
  "subcategory_name" TEXT /* Name of the subcategory */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the subcategory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subcategory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tests_categories" (
  "test_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test-category relationship */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tests_categories_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES tests ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tests_categories_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES test_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tests_subcategories" (
  "test_subcategory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test-subcategory relationship */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test */,
  "subcategory_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subcategory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_subcategory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tests_subcategories_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES tests ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tests_subcategories_subcategory_id FOREIGN KEY ("subcategory_id") REFERENCES test_subcategories ("subcategory_id")
)
